---
title: "Chromatin Accessibility Changes Across Developmental Time Points in Human Corticogenesis"
author: "Razmin Bari"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(Matrix)
library(Seurat)
library(Signac)
library(ggplot2)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(JASPAR2020)
library(TFBSTools)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
```

```{r}
meta <- fread("~/final_biost2154/data/GSE162170_atac_cell_metadata.txt.gz")
rownames(meta) <- meta$Cell.ID

# sample 3000 cells
set.seed(123)
subset_cells <- sample(meta$Cell.ID, 3000)
```

```{r}
# internal mapping
cell_index_lookup <- match(subset_cells, meta$Cell.ID)

counts_subset <- fread(
  "~/final_biost2154/data/GSE162170_atac_counts.tsv.gz",
  select = cell_index_lookup,
  header = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
mat <- as(as.matrix(counts_subset), "dgCMatrix")
rownames(mat) <- paste0("peak_", seq_len(nrow(mat)))
colnames(mat) <- subset_cells

```

```{r}
peaks <- fread("~/final_biost2154/data/GSE162170_atac_consensus_peaks.bed.gz",
               header = FALSE)

# Keep only BED3 (chr, start, end)
peaks3 <- peaks[, 1:3]
setnames(peaks3, c("chr", "start", "end"))

gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(peaks3)
names(gr) <- rownames(mat)

```

```{r}
meta_df <- as.data.frame(meta)
rownames(meta_df) <- meta_df$Cell.ID
meta.data <- meta_df[subset_cells, ]

# Create a ChromatinAssay (this attaches the GRanges peaks properly)
chrom_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(
  counts = mat,
  ranges = gr,
  genome = "hg38",
  sep = c("-", "-")
)

# Build Seurat object using this assay
atac <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = chrom_assay,
  assay = "ATAC",
  meta.data = meta.data
)


```

# Aim 1{.tabset}

## Compute total counts per cell + normalization
```{r}
atac$TotalCounts <- Matrix::colSums(atac@assays$ATAC@counts)
atac$log10_TotalCounts <- log10(atac$TotalCounts + 1)

```

## Violin plot by developmental stage
```{r}
VlnPlot(atac, "log10_TotalCounts", group.by = "Age")
VlnPlot(
    atac,
    features = "log10_TotalCounts",
    group.by = "Age",
    pt.size = 0.1
) + 
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "white", color = "black", outlier.shape = NA)

```

## Kruskal-Wallis test
```{r}
kruskal.test(log10_TotalCounts ~ Age, data = atac@meta.data)
```

## Compute TF-IDF and UMAP
```{r}
atac <- RunTFIDF(atac)
atac <- FindTopFeatures(atac)
atac <- RunSVD(atac)
atac <- RunUMAP(atac, reduction = "lsi", dims = 2:30)
```

```{r}
DimPlot(atac, group.by = "Age") +
  ggtitle("Chromatin Accessibility UMAP grouped by Developmental Age")
DimPlot(atac, group.by = "Tissue.ID", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
    ggtitle("Tissue-Specific Chromatin Accessibility UMAP")
DimPlot(
    atac,
    group.by = "Tissue.ID",
    split.by = "Age",
    label = TRUE,
    repel = TRUE
) + ggtitle("Tissue-Specific Chromatin Accessibility UMAP Split by Age")

DimPlot(
    atac,
    group.by = "Age",
    split.by = "Tissue.ID",
    label = TRUE,
    repel = TRUE
) + ggtitle("Tissue-Specific Chromatin Accessibility UMAP Split by Age")

```

# Aim 2{.tabset}

## Differential Accessibility across the developmental time points (with the earliest time point pcw16 as the baseline) (ANOVA)
```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. Filter low-accessibility peaks
# -----------------------------

# Keep peaks present in >=1% of cells
min_cells <- ceiling(0.01 * ncol(atac))
peak_filter <- rowSums(atac@assays$ATAC@counts > 0) >= min_cells
atac_filtered <- subset(atac, features = rownames(atac)[peak_filter])

cat("Number of peaks after filtering:", nrow(atac_filtered), "\n")

# -----------------------------
# 2. Set Idents by developmental stage
# -----------------------------
atac_filtered$Age <- factor(atac_filtered$Age,
                            levels = c("pcw16", "pcw20", "pcw21", "pcw24"))
Idents(atac_filtered) <- atac_filtered$Age

saveRDS(atac_filtered, file = "atac_filtered_2154.rds")
# -----------------------------
# 3. Pairwise differential accessibility (PCW16 baseline)
# -----------------------------
ages <- levels(atac_filtered$Age)

# # pcw20 vs pcw16
# da_pcw20_vs_pcw16 <- FindMarkers(
#   object = atac_filtered,
#   ident.1 = "pcw20",
#   ident.2 = "pcw16",
#   test.use = "LR",
#   latent.vars = "nCount_ATAC",
#   min.pct = 0.05
# )
# 
# # pcw21 vs pcw16
# da_pcw21_vs_pcw16 <- FindMarkers(
#   object = atac_filtered,
#   ident.1 = "pcw21",
#   ident.2 = "pcw16",
#   test.use = "LR",
#   latent.vars = "nCount_ATAC",
#   min.pct = 0.05
# )
# 
# # pcw24 vs pcw16
# da_pcw24_vs_pcw16 <- FindMarkers(
#   object = atac_filtered,
#   ident.1 = "pcw24",
#   ident.2 = "pcw16",
#   test.use = "LR",
#   latent.vars = "nCount_ATAC",
#   min.pct = 0.05
# )

# saveRDS(da_pcw20_vs_pcw16, file = "da_20vs16_2154")
# saveRDS(da_pcw21_vs_pcw16, file = "da_21vs16_2154")
# saveRDS(da_pcw24_vs_pcw16, file = "da_24vs16_2154")

# Load differential accessibility result objects
da_pcw20_vs_pcw16 <- readRDS("da_20vs16_2154")
da_pcw21_vs_pcw16 <- readRDS("da_21vs16_2154")
da_pcw24_vs_pcw16 <- readRDS("da_24vs16_2154")

# -----------------------------
# 4. Extract significant peaks
# -----------------------------
sig_pcw20_vs_pcw16 <- subset(da_pcw20_vs_pcw16, p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.25)
sig_pcw21_vs_pcw16 <- subset(da_pcw21_vs_pcw16, p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.25)
sig_pcw24_vs_pcw16 <- subset(da_pcw24_vs_pcw16, p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.25)


# -----------------------------
# 5. Annotate peaks with nearest genes
# -----------------------------
annotations <- genes(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
Annotation(atac_filtered) <- annotations

annot_pcw20 <- ClosestFeature(atac_filtered, rownames(sig_pcw20_vs_pcw16))
annot_pcw21 <- ClosestFeature(atac_filtered, rownames(sig_pcw21_vs_pcw16))
annot_pcw24 <- ClosestFeature(atac_filtered, rownames(sig_pcw24_vs_pcw16))

```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 6. Motif enrichment
# -----------------------------
# Add motifs
pfm <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2020, opts = list(species = 9606, all_versions = FALSE))
atac_filtered <- AddMotifs(
  object = atac_filtered,
  genome = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38,
  pfm = pfm
)

# Helper function to add TF names to motif results
add_tf_names <- function(motif_results) {
  motif_ids <- rownames(motif_results)  # e.g., MA0161.2
  # get JASPAR motifs
  motifs_db <- getMatrixSet(JASPAR2020, opts = list(species = 9606, all_versions = FALSE))
  
  tf_names <- sapply(motif_ids, function(id) {
    if(id %in% names(motifs_db)) {
      name(motifs_db[[id]])
    } else {
      NA
    }
  })
  
  motif_results$TF <- tf_names
  return(motif_results)
}

library(ggplot2)

plot_volcano <- function(da_df, title = "") {
  da_df$Significant <- ifelse(da_df$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(da_df$avg_log2FC) > 0.25, "Yes", "No")
  
  ggplot(da_df, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), color = Significant)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("No" = "grey", "Yes" = "red")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = title,
         x = "log2 Fold Change",
         y = "-log10 Adjusted P-value")
}

# Example: PCW24 vs PCW16
plot_volcano(sig_pcw24_vs_pcw16, title = "Volcano Plot: PCW24 vs PCW16")

plot_volcano(sig_pcw21_vs_pcw16, title = "Volcano Plot: PCW21 vs PCW16")

plot_volcano(sig_pcw20_vs_pcw16, title = "Volcano Plot: PCW20 vs PCW16")

```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# PCW20 vs PCW16
da_peaks <- rownames(sig_pcw20_vs_pcw16)
da_peaks <- da_peaks[da_peaks %in% rownames(atac_filtered)]
motif_results_PCW20 <- FindMotifs(object = atac_filtered, features = da_peaks)
motif_results_PCW20 <- add_tf_names(motif_results_PCW20)
head(motif_results_PCW20)

# -----------------------------
# PCW21 vs PCW16
da_peaks2 <- rownames(sig_pcw21_vs_pcw16)
da_peaks2 <- da_peaks2[da_peaks2 %in% rownames(atac_filtered)]
motif_results_PCW21 <- FindMotifs(object = atac_filtered, features = da_peaks2)
motif_results_PCW21 <- add_tf_names(motif_results_PCW21)
head(motif_results_PCW21)

# -----------------------------
# PCW24 vs PCW16
da_peaks3 <- rownames(sig_pcw24_vs_pcw16)
da_peaks3 <- da_peaks3[da_peaks3 %in% rownames(atac_filtered)]
motif_results_PCW24 <- FindMotifs(object = atac_filtered, features = da_peaks3)
motif_results_PCW24 <- add_tf_names(motif_results_PCW24)
head(motif_results_PCW24)

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
# Example: PCW20 motif results
pretty_PCW20 <- motif_results_PCW20 %>%
  select(motif, TF, fold.enrichment, p.adjust, observed) %>%   # pick relevant columns
  arrange(desc(fold.enrichment)) %>%                           # optional: sort by enrichment
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05)                                      # optional: show only significant motifs

# Create a nice table
kable(pretty_PCW20, 
      caption = "Top enriched motifs in PCW20 vs PCW16",
      col.names = c("Motif ID", "Transcription Factor", "Fold Enrichment", "Adjusted P-value", "# Peaks"),
      digits = 3)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Example: PCW20 pretty table
pretty_PCW20 <- motif_results_PCW20 %>%
  dplyr::select(TF, fold.enrichment, p.adjust) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

# Assign categories manually
pretty_PCW20 <- pretty_PCW20 %>%
  mutate(Category = case_when(
    TF %in% c("PAX6", "ASCL1") ~ "Progenitor TF",
    TF %in% c("NEUROD1", "TBR1", "MEF2C", "NEUROG2") ~ "Neuronal TF",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

# Summarize counts or mean enrichment per category
summary_PCW20 <- pretty_PCW20 %>%
  group_by(Category) %>%
  summarise(Count = n(),
            MeanEnrichment = mean(fold.enrichment))

# Bar chart: count of enriched motifs per category
ggplot(summary_PCW20, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Enriched Motifs by TF Category (PCW20 vs PCW16)",
       x = "TF Category",
       y = "Number of Motifs") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggplot(summary_PCW20, aes(x = Category, y = MeanEnrichment, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Average Fold Enrichment by TF Category (PCW20 vs PCW16)",
       x = "TF Category",
       y = "Mean Fold Enrichment") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Add stage column
sig_pcw20 <- sig_pcw20_vs_pcw16 %>% mutate(Stage = "PCW20")
sig_pcw21 <- sig_pcw21_vs_pcw16 %>% mutate(Stage = "PCW21")
sig_pcw24 <- sig_pcw24_vs_pcw16 %>% mutate(Stage = "PCW24")

# Combine into one data frame
volcano_combined <- bind_rows(sig_pcw20, sig_pcw21, sig_pcw24)

# Define significance
volcano_combined$Significant <- ifelse(volcano_combined$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(volcano_combined$avg_log2FC) > 0.25, "Yes", "No")

# Plot
ggplot(volcano_combined, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), color = Stage)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Differential Accessibility Volcano Plots Across Developmental Stages",
       x = "log2 Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 Adjusted P-value") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("PCW20" = "blue", "PCW21" = "green", "PCW24" = "red")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 10), legend.position = "top")

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

# Helper function to get top 5 motifs per stage
get_top_motifs <- function(motif_results, stage_name) {
  motif_results %>%
    dplyr::select(motif, TF, fold.enrichment, p.adjust, observed) %>%
    dplyr::filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%       # significant motifs only
    dplyr::arrange(desc(fold.enrichment)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 5) %>%            # top 5
    dplyr::mutate(Stage = stage_name)        # add stage column
}

# Get top 5 motifs for each stage
top_PCW20 <- get_top_motifs(motif_results_PCW20, "PCW20")
top_PCW21 <- get_top_motifs(motif_results_PCW21, "PCW21")
top_PCW24 <- get_top_motifs(motif_results_PCW24, "PCW24")

# Combine into one table
top_motifs_all <- bind_rows(top_PCW20, top_PCW21, top_PCW24) %>%
  dplyr::select(Stage, motif, TF, fold.enrichment, p.adjust, observed)

# Create nice table
kable(top_motifs_all,
      caption = "Top 5 Enriched Motifs per Developmental Stage",
      col.names = c("Stage", "Motif ID", "Transcription Factor", "Fold Enrichment", "Adjusted P-value", "# Peaks"),
      digits = 3)

```
